definition: An observance day marked by renewed ethical and contemplative practice.
notes: Dhammarato's chanting manual reinforces uposatha as both an observance day and a formal monastic recitation setting tied to precepts and patimokkha procedures.

context_rules.context: In monastic observance and patimokkha-recitation contexts
context_rules.notes: Use the untranslated term when the formal observance setting matters more than the calendar gloss.
